name: First State Bank
description_short: Buxton, ND residents can access First State Bank at 423 Broadway for personal and business banking services.
description_long:
First State Bank's Buxton, ND branch is located at 423 Broadway, serving customers in this small North Dakota community. The standalone location provides traditional banking services to Buxton residents and surrounding areas. Hours are not published online, so call ahead or stop by during typical business hours.

At this Buxton branch, you can handle deposit accounts, loans, and other banking needs. While a specific phone number isn't listed for the Buxton location, you can reach First State Bank's main office to be connected to the appropriate department serving Buxton customers.

If you're a Buxton resident needing to open an account, apply for a loan, or conduct banking business in person, bring a government-issued ID and any relevant financial documents. First State Bank provides community banking services designed for local needs.
